messages.content: You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My father came back from India during the monsoon, when the rice was still in the field.
Note B: My father returned from India just after Dashain, when the harvest was already done.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "returned during monsoon, pre-harvest", "note_b_claim": "returned after Dashain, post-harvest", "resolution": "flag for speaker confirmation — monsoon and post-Dashain are incompatible seasons"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My eldest son was born in 2034 BS.
Note B: My eldest son was born the year after we moved to Kathmandu, which was 2036 BS.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "born 2034 BS", "note_b_claim": "born 2037 BS (year after 2036 move)", "resolution": "flag — two-year discrepancy, confirm birth year and year of Kathmandu move separately"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: The flood destroyed our lower field during Ashadh.
Note B: The flood came in Kartik, just after the harvest. We had already stored the grain, so we did not lose it.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "flood in Ashadh (monsoon month)", "note_b_claim": "flood in Kartik (post-harvest autumn month)", "resolution": "flag — Ashadh and Kartik are four months apart, likely two different floods or one mis-remembered month"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My grandmother died when I was seven years old.
Note B: My grandmother was still alive at my bratabandha, which happened when I was ten.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "grandmother died when speaker was age 7", "note_b_claim": "grandmother alive at bratabandha when speaker was age 10", "resolution": "flag — direct contradiction, grandmother cannot be both dead at 7 and alive at 10, confirm age at grandmother's death"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: We left the village before Tihar that year.
Note B: I remember celebrating Tihar in the village and leaving shortly after the new year.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "departed before Tihar", "note_b_claim": "departed after Tihar and after new year", "resolution": "flag — departure is placed on opposite sides of Tihar, confirm which festival was the departure marker"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My sister's wedding was in Falgun, when the mustard was blooming.
Note B: My sister married in Mangsir. I remember because it was cold and we wore heavy shawls for the ceremony.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "wedding in Falgun (late winter, mustard season)", "note_b_claim": "wedding in Mangsir (early winter, cold)", "resolution": "flag — three-month discrepancy, both seasonal details are credible, confirm with other family members"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: The new road reached our village in 2050 BS.
Note B: The road came the same year my youngest daughter started school, which was 2055 BS.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "road arrived 2050 BS", "note_b_claim": "road arrived 2055 BS", "resolution": "flag — five-year gap, confirm school enrollment year of youngest daughter independently"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My father passed away in the summer, in the heat.
Note B: I remember my father's funeral clearly — we shivered through the whole ceremony, it was deep winter.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "father died in summer heat", "note_b_claim": "father died in deep winter, cold funeral", "resolution": "flag — season directly contradicted, summer and deep winter are incompatible, high-priority confirmation needed"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: I was married at seventeen.
Note B: I got married the year I turned twenty. My mother kept saying I was too old already.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "married at age 17", "note_b_claim": "married at age 20", "resolution": "flag — three-year age discrepancy at marriage, confirm birth year and marriage year separately"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: The earthquake struck early in the morning, before anyone had eaten.
Note B: We were sitting down for our midday meal when the earthquake hit. The plates fell off the table.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "earthquake struck early morning, pre-meal", "note_b_claim": "earthquake struck midday during meal", "resolution": "flag — time of day directly contradicted, early morning versus midday, confirm which meal was interrupted or if two separate events"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My uncle came back from the army before I finished school.
Note B: My uncle returned from service after I had already been working for two years, so I must have been around twenty-two.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "uncle returned while speaker still in school, approximately under age 16", "note_b_claim": "uncle returned when speaker was around 22, two years after finishing work", "resolution": "flag — six-plus year discrepancy, confirm uncle's service duration independently"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: We planted the apple trees the year after my second son was born.
Note B: Those apple trees were already fruiting by the time my second son started walking.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "trees planted one year after second son's birth", "note_b_claim": "trees already fruiting before second son walked, approximately age 1", "resolution": "flag — apple trees planted after birth cannot fruit before child walks one year later, timeline compressed impossibly"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My parents built the new room before my youngest sister was born.
Note B: My youngest sister helped carry bricks when we built the new room. She was maybe five or six.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "room built before youngest sister's birth", "note_b_claim": "youngest sister aged 5–6 participated in building room", "resolution": "flag — room cannot be built both before and with participation of youngest sister, confirm which sibling helped or whether multiple rooms were built"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: The panchayat ended when I was still a young man, maybe twenty-five.
Note B: I was already a grandfather when the political changes came. Things were very different by then.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "panchayat ended when speaker was approximately 25", "note_b_claim": "speaker was already a grandfather at political changes", "resolution": "flag — being 25 and being a grandfather are incompatible life stages for the same event, confirm which political change is referenced"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: The well in the village dried up during the drought, two years before the road came.
Note B: The drought happened the same year the road was built. I remember because the workers had no water either.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "drought occurred two years before road construction", "note_b_claim": "drought and road construction happened in the same year", "resolution": "flag — two years apart versus simultaneous, confirm road construction year independently"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My husband left for the Gulf in Baisakh.
Note B: My husband went to Qatar in Poush, just before the coldest part of winter. I cried every night that first month.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "husband departed in Baisakh (spring, Nepali new year month)", "note_b_claim": "husband departed in Poush (winter)", "resolution": "flag — Baisakh and Poush are seven months apart, confirm departure month, possibly conflated with a return visit"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: The fire in the upper village happened when I was twelve.
Note B: I was in my twenties, newly married, when the fire destroyed those houses. My husband and I helped carry water.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "fire occurred when speaker was age 12", "note_b_claim": "fire occurred when speaker was in twenties and newly married", "resolution": "flag — decade-plus discrepancy, confirm whether one or two fires are being recalled"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My mother's younger sister died in Shrawan.
Note B: My maijyu passed in Falgun. I know because the mustard was in bloom and we put flowers from the field on her body.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "younger maternal aunt died in Shrawan (monsoon)", "note_b_claim": "died in Falgun (late winter, mustard season)", "resolution": "flag — seven-month discrepancy, seasonal evidence in Note B is specific and credible, confirm with other family members"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: We got electricity in our house in 2058 BS.
Note B: We had electric light by 2052 BS. I remember reading by the bulb and thinking how much easier school would have been with this light.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "electricity installed 2058 BS", "note_b_claim": "electricity installed by 2052 BS", "resolution": "flag — six-year gap, confirm whether two separate connections or one mis-remembered year"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My first child was born three years after our wedding.
Note B: My eldest was born the year we got married. We were not yet properly settled when she arrived.

Note A: The conflict in our area was worst when my children were still small, the youngest still nursing.
Note B: By the time the trouble came to our village, my youngest was already in secondary school.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "conflict at peak when youngest child was nursing, approximately under age 2", "note_b_claim": "conflict arrived when youngest child was in secondary school, approximately age 11–14", "resolution": "flag — decade-plus discrepancy for same youngest child, confirm child's age during worst conflict period"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My father retired from his government post at sixty.
Note B: My father stopped working when he was fifty-five. His knees gave out and he could not walk to the office anymore.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "father retired at age 60", "note_b_claim": "father stopped working at age 55 due to health", "resolution": "flag — five-year discrepancy, confirm whether health retirement at 55 and official retirement at 60 are separate events"}

Note A: The old gompa was restored before I was born. My parents remembered the celebration.
Note B: The gompa restoration happened when I was a teenager. I carried stones up the hill to help.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "gompa restored before speaker's birth, parents' generation memory", "note_b_claim": "speaker personally participated in restoration as a teenager", "resolution": "flag — direct contradiction between secondhand and firsthand account, confirm whether one or two restorations occurred"}

You are a reconciler agent. Given two memory notes, detect if they contradict each other on timing. Output JSON with keys: conflict, conflict_type, note_a_claim, note_b_claim, resolution. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

Note A: My brother came back from India just in time for my wedding.
Note B: My brother missed my wedding entirely. He was still in India. I was sad about it for a long time.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "brother returned from India in time for wedding", "note_b_claim": "brother missed wedding, still in India", "resolution": "flag — direct presence-or-absence contradiction for same event, confirm with sibling or other wedding attendees"}

Note A: We sold the buffalo in Chaitra, at the end of the dry season.
Note B: We sold the buffalo just before the monsoon planting. We needed the money for seed, so it must have been Ashadh.

{"conflict": true, "conflict_type": "date conflict", "note_a_claim": "buffalo sold in Chaitra (end of dry season, pre-new year)", "note_b_claim": "buffalo sold in Ashadh (monsoon planting season)", "resolution": "flag — three-month gap between Chaitra and Ashadh, both seasonal reasons are plausible, confirm against financial records if available"}
